rev4_target: context-enriched workers complete >=50% of corpus without human rescue

scenarios.summary: Rev-4 corpus issues that meet membership criteria but bounce as blocked_not_dispatch_bounded are admitted via the corpus-aware dispatch heuristic.

reference_issues.scope_hint: Narrow broad except Exception in mfa_enforcement.py
Narrow broad except Exception in swarm_status.py

scenarios.expected_post_admission_signal: dispatch contract gate proceeds past corpus membership check; downstream observability records corpus_aware_dispatch_admitted

scenarios.summary: Rev-4 corpus issues flagged as blocked_auth_failure due to missing credential-envelope slices are admitted by synthesizing a corpus-marked envelope without modifying CredentialEnvelope.from_environment().

reference_issues.scope_hint: Narrow broad except Exception in mfa_enforcement.py
Narrow broad except Exception in swarm_status.py

preconditions: PR-1 (#7225) corpus-aware dispatch is enabled or the dispatch contract gate has otherwise exposed the failure class
Dispatch contract gate exposes blocked_auth_failure on the flagged shape
CredentialEnvelope.from_environment() returns an envelope with at least one slice missing
scenarios.behavior_when_flag_off: no-op; dispatch contract gate proceeds with the unmodified envelope from CredentialEnvelope.from_environment()
scenarios.behavior_when_flag_on: synthesizer returns a new CredentialEnvelope with corpus_admitted markers on missing slices; complete slices are preserved verbatim
scenarios.expected_post_admission_signal: dispatch_contract_gate logs credential_envelope_probe_synthesized issue=#<N> execution_class=<class> missing_before=<list>

non_goals: execute live benchmark or model calls
change CredentialEnvelope substrate or TerminalClass mapping
modify dispatch_followups.py or dispatch_contract_gate.py beyond what PR-1 and PR-2 already shipped

verification_paths.verification: git log on main contains the squash-merge commit for #7225 (corpus-aware dispatch)
git log on main contains commit 2c58510c40f1cf914c54bed259beb0eb19e98379 (credential-envelope corpus synthesis)
